title: Flip Columns For Maximum Number of Equal Rows
titleCn: 按列翻转得到最大值等行数

testcases.input: matrix = [[0,1],[1,1]] Output: 1 Explanation: After flipping no values, 1 row has all values equal.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: After flipping no values, 1 row has all values equal.

testcases.input: matrix = [[0,1],[1,0]] Output: 2 Explanation: After flipping values in the first column, both rows have equal values.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: After flipping values in the first column, both rows have equal values.

testcases.input: matrix = [[0,0,0],[0,0,1],[1,1,0]] Output: 2 Explanation: After flipping values in the first two columns, the last two rows have equal values.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: After flipping values in the first two columns, the last two rows have equal values.
